metadata.name: fogo_onre_relayer
metadata.description: Fogo OnRe relayer — stateless PDA-custody bridge between OnRe and Wormhole NTT on Solana

docs: Cross-chain relayer: USDC.s on FOGO ↔ ONyc on Solana, both legs over
Wormhole NTT. Lets FOGO users hold OnRe's ONyc yield exposure without
leaving FOGO.

instructions.name: accept_authority
docs: Two-step rotation, step 2. Signer must equal `pending_authority`;
current authority does not sign (lets independent multisigs rotate
without atomic co-sign).

instructions.name: cancel_redemption_onyc
docs: Authority-only escape hatch — rolls a stuck redemption back to
`Claimed` and frees the singleton. Authority-gated to prevent a
request→cancel fee-griefing loop.

accounts.name: relayer_authority
docs: `redemption_request`, so unlocked ONyc returns to its `onyc_ata`.

accounts.name: onyc_ata
docs: Receives unlocked ONyc from OnRe's redemption vault.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Receives rent from closed `redemption_tracker`. Need not equal
`tracker.payer` — close-target is `payer_for_close` below.

accounts.name: redemption_request
docs: it has been closed by OnRe.

instructions.name: claim_usdc
docs: Redeem inbound USDC.s VAA, create inbound `Flow` receipt.

accounts.name: usdc_ata
docs: Sweep destination — long-lived relayer-authority USDC ATA.

accounts.name: user_wallet
docs: Originating FOGO wallet (Solana keys are chain-agnostic).
Pinned via `user_inbox_authority` PDA derivation + NTT release
ATA-authority check. See handler doc.

accounts.name: user_inbox_ata
docs: NTT release_inbound deposits here; sweep moves exactly
`flow.amount` to `usdc_ata`. Not `init_if_needed`: FOGO
`bridge_ntt_tokens` arg `pay_destination_ata_rent: true` makes
the executor create the ATA on first delivery.

accounts.name: ntt_inbox_item
docs: No `#[account(owner = ...)]` here: on a fresh claim NTT redeem
creates this account, so a pre-handler owner constraint would
fail every first-time claim. The owner check runs in
`validate_skip_path_inbox_item` — the only path where forgery is
possible (no NTT CPI runs).

accounts.name: inflight_flow
docs: `init` blocks double-claims against the same inbox item.

accounts.name: redemption_tracker
docs: Withdraw-chain mutex gate. `SystemAccount` asserts no
`RedemptionTracker` exists — pauses deposit inflows so they
can't pollute `claim_redemption_usdc`'s delta math.

instructions.name: configure
docs: Authority-only. `None` args leave fields unchanged. Fee decreases
apply instantly; increases stage for `FEE_TIMELOCK_SLOTS` (~2 days)
then auto-promote on the next `configure` after the window.

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: `None` leaves the stored vault unchanged.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: One-time setup: config PDA + relayer-authority-owned ATAs.

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Forbid `fee_vault == onyc_ata` to prevent self-transfer no-ops
that would commingle user funds with fees.

instructions.name: lock_onyc
docs: Lock ONyc via NTT and atomically emit the outbound VAA.
`transfer_lock_account_count` splits `remaining_accounts` between
`transfer_lock` and `release_wormhole_outbound`.

instructions.name: request_redemption_onyc
docs: Forward flow's ONyc to OnRe + init singleton tracker; fee taken pre-CPI.

accounts.name: usdc_ata
docs: Pre-balance snapshot for `claim_redemption_usdc` delta.

accounts.name: onyc_ata
docs: Source for fee transfer; OnRe's CPI also pulls from here.

accounts.name: redemption_tracker
docs: Singleton init — fails if a prior redemption is mid-flight.
On-chain mutex that makes the ATA-delta math safe.

accounts.name: redemption_tracker
docs: Singleton mutex gate — a concurrent outflow during an in-flight
redemption would poison the pre-balance delta. Stuck redemptions
are recovered via `cancel_redemption_onyc`.

accounts.name: redemption_tracker
docs: Withdraw-chain mutex gate (see `claim_usdc`).

instructions.name: unlock_onyc
docs: Release ONyc from NTT custody, create outbound `Flow` receipt.

errors.name: InvalidAccountSplit
errors.msg: remaining_accounts split point is out of range

errors.name: AuthorityNotInAccounts
errors.msg: Relayer authority PDA not present in forwarded CPI accounts

errors.name: ZeroFogoSender
errors.msg: Parsed fogo_sender is the zero address

errors.name: UnauthorizedAuthority
errors.msg: Caller is not the authority

errors.name: FlowStatusMismatch
errors.msg: Flow is not in the expected status for this operation

errors.name: BalanceUnderflow
errors.msg: Post-CPI balance is less than pre-CPI balance

errors.name: ZeroAmountFlow
errors.msg: Bridge or swap produced zero tokens

errors.name: FeeBpsTooHigh
errors.msg: Fee basis points exceed MAX_FEE_BPS

errors.name: FeeOverflow
errors.msg: Fee computation overflow

errors.name: MissingSessionAuthority
errors.msg: NTT session authority PDA not found in remaining_accounts

errors.name: InvalidTransceiverMessage
errors.msg: NTT ValidatedTransceiverMessage account is malformed or too short

errors.name: TransceiverMessageMismatch
errors.msg: ntt_transceiver_message does not match the account consumed by the NTT redeem CPI

errors.name: InboxItemMismatch
errors.msg: ntt_inbox_item does not match the account consumed by the NTT CPIs

errors.name: RecipientAtaMismatch
errors.msg: Destination token account does not match the ATA consumed by the NTT release CPI

errors.name: FeeVaultAliasesUserAta
errors.msg: fee_vault must not alias the relayer's ONyc operating ATA

errors.name: NoPendingAuthority
errors.msg: No pending authority — nothing to accept

errors.name: PendingAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: Signer does not match relayer_config.pending_authority

errors.name: RedemptionNotFulfilled
errors.msg: OnRe RedemptionRequest PDA still exists — redemption_admin has not fulfilled yet

errors.name: RedemptionRequestMismatch
errors.msg: Provided redemption_request account does not match tracker.redemption_request

errors.name: RedemptionTrackerFlowMismatch
errors.msg: RedemptionTracker.flow does not match the bound Flow PDA

errors.name: EmptyPendingFee
errors.msg: PendingFee bundle has no inner leg set — invariant violation

errors.name: WrongOriginChain
errors.msg: Inbound NTT message did not originate from the FOGO peer chain

errors.name: UnexpectedOnycConsumed
errors.msg: Post-CPI ONyc balance dropped — OnRe consumed ONyc unexpectedly

errors.name: UserInboxAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: user_inbox_ata's authority does not match the [user_inbox, user_wallet] PDA

errors.name: UnexpectedFogoSender
errors.msg: NTT VAA's NttManagerMessage.sender is not the intent_transfer setter PDA — deposit must originate via intent_transfer

errors.name: InvalidInboxItem
errors.msg: ntt_inbox_item account is missing, too short, or has the wrong discriminator

errors.name: InsufficientInboxBalance
errors.msg: user_inbox_ata balance is below the NTT-recorded inbox_item.amount — inbox was not credited as expected

errors.name: PendingAuthorityIsCurrent
errors.msg: Proposed pending_authority equals the current authority — self-rotate is rejected

types.name: Flow
docs: One-shot receipt binding an inbound bridge message to a FOGO wallet.
Replay protection lives in the per-VAA NTT claim account. Field set
is byte-stable — older PDAs must keep deserializing.

fields.name: fogo_sender
docs: Originator on FOGO; outbound recipient on the return leg.

fields.name: ready_slot
docs: MAX-extended on later raises so a follow-up never shortens the window.

types.name: RedemptionTracker
docs: Singleton mutex for the in-flight withdraw-chain redemption.
`init` here fails if another redemption is mid-flight, blocking the
USDC-delta race.

fields.name: redemption_request
docs: OnRe `RedemptionRequest` PDA; polled for closure as fulfillment signal.

fields.name: usdc_ata_pre_balance
docs: Relayer USDC ATA balance pre-CPI; `claim_redemption_usdc` uses
post-fulfillment delta vs this.

fields.name: onyc_amount_in
docs: Audit-trail only — net-of-fee ONyc sent to OnRe.

fields.name: payer
docs: Pays for init, receives rent on close.

types.name: RelayerConfig
docs: `authority` gates governance only; flow instructions are permissionless.

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Promoted to `authority` by `accept_authority` (two-step handoff).

fields.name: pending_fee
docs: Staged fee *increase*, auto-promoted on next `configure` once
`ready_slot` elapses. Decreases bypass this.

constants.name: WORMHOLE_CORE_PROGRAM_ID
docs: Wormhole Core Bridge program id. Documentation pin only — release CPIs
dispatch via `remaining_accounts`, no on-chain read site today.
